strategy: Hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+13%), avoid Balance (70% resist).

He heals 500 health per minion by sacrificing his Conscripted Manders whenever he is attacked, and he keeps re-summoning them, so use an AoE to kill the minions and hit him in the same blow so his sacrifice heal is wasted.
Skip traps: placing a trap on him puts a Weakness on you. Buff with blades instead.
At only 3,070 health, one bladed AoE that clears the board ends it before his heals matter.
Watch for an occasional Sandstorm plus Black Mantle on a wizard when he is attacked, shield or accept the accuracy hit.
cheatNotes: He summons a Conscripted Mander at the end of Round 1.
He summons another at the end of Round 2 and keeps replacing any minion that dies or is sacrificed.
When attacked he sacrifices his minions for 500 health each, kill the minions with an AoE in the same hit so he cannot heal off them.
Place a trap on him and he puts a Weakness on you, use blades, not traps.
When attacked he occasionally casts Sandstorm and a Black Mantle on one wizard, shield for the accuracy debuff.
